properties.name: wiretap.default-log
properties.description: Toggle the default Spring Boot application log layout (instead of the structured JSON one)

properties.name: wiretap.pretty-print
properties.description: Toggle pretty-printed JSON log output

properties.name: wiretap.file-logging.enabled
properties.description: Toggle writing logs to a file

properties.name: wiretap.file-logging.path
properties.description: Root directory where log files are written

properties.name: wiretap.stacktrace.max-depth
properties.description: Maximum logged stack-trace depth

properties.name: wiretap.stacktrace.max-length
properties.description: Maximum logged stack-trace length (characters)

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings
properties.description: Body logging settings

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.extra-info-field-name
properties.description: Top-level field name in the log object that holds the user-supplied extra request info

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings.enable-body-truncating
properties.description: Toggle truncation of long string fields in inbound/outbound JSON bodies

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.enable-url-masking
properties.description: Toggle URL masking on logged requests

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings.max-field-length
properties.description: Maximum string length for fields inside inbound/outbound JSON bodies

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings.max-body-length
properties.description: Maximum logged length of inbound/outbound message bodies

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.http-body-settings.enable-body-masking
properties.description: Toggle masking of request/response bodies

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.exclude-request-patterns
properties.description: URL regex patterns to skip from logging for inbound requests

properties.name: wiretap.rest-controllers.request-headers
properties.description: Request headers to log

properties.description: Response headers to log

properties.name: wiretap.tracing.propagation.type.b3.enabled
properties.description: Enable the legacy 64-bit B3 trace-id format

properties.name: wiretap.headers.forward-to-mdc
properties.description: Names of inbound headers that are forwarded into MDC under the same key. Override this list to recognise infrastructure-specific correlation headers (e.g. tcs-session-key, eKassir-PointID).

properties.name: wiretap.headers.session-key-header
properties.description: Name of the inbound header whose value is emitted as the session_key field in HTTP access logs.
